notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Xavier Edwards walks. Jakob Marsee to 3rd. Jakob Marsee advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Drake Baldwin.

notableEvents.label: Ozzie Albies plunked
notableEvents.detail: Ozzie Albies hit by pitch. Mike Yastrzemski to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Graham Pauley GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Graham Pauley grounds into a double play, shortstop Mauricio Dubón to first baseman Matt Olson. Javier Sanoja out at 2nd. Graham Pauley out at 1st.
